newsLog.text: New scores found: Rye Neck 13-1 over Haldane (Apr 1), Rye Neck 15-5 over Sleepy Hollow (Apr 2), Briarcliff 14-0 over Sleepy Hollow (Mar 31), Blind Brook 8-7 over Edgemont (Mar 26). Sleepy Hollow now 2-2, Haldane 1-1, Rye Neck 3-0, Blind Brook 1-2, Edgemont 0-2. No new DF games. DF next: Apr 7 at Edgemont.
Games today: Rye Neck at Sleepy Hollow 12PM, Ardsley at John Jay-CR 11AM. Haldane at Rye Neck (Apr 1) result not yet confirmed. No new DF scores. DF next game: Apr 7 at Edgemont.
Westlake 11, Hastings 2. Division B LEAGUE game at Disney Wide World of Sports. Westlake dominates.

newsLog.text: Games to Watch Apr 2: Ardsley at John Jay-CR 11AM, Rye Neck at Sleepy Hollow 12PM.
Haldane 10, Peekskill 0. Haldane opens 2026 with dominant shutout at Mayors Park, Cold Spring.
Pleasantville-Ardsley Mar 24 score confirmed: Pleasantville 7, Ardsley 1. Previously had no exact score.

Hastings still 1-0 per DigitalSports. Pelham game (Mar 30) no score posted. Westlake league game today (Mar 31) at 6 PM.
Hastings vs Westlake at Disney Wide World of Sports scheduled for Mar 31 at 6:00 PM. Two DF schedule opponents face off.

Added DigitalSports (Section 1 school athletics sites) as a regular source. Provides official schedules, scores, and venue data.
Westlake vs Valhalla at Disney ESPN Wide World of Sports today at 3:30pm. Both Division B teams at same spring break tournament.
Haldane hosts Peekskill today at 5:00 PM per GameDay One.
Hastings at Disney World spring trip. Played Pelham at Disney Stadium (non-league). Score not yet posted.

EAGLES WIN 8-3: DF defeats Saunders at Gould Park. Record: 2-0.
Tuckahoe JV tied Putnam Valley JV 5-5.

MAJOR CORRECTION: Irvington Mar 26 game was NOT a 10-1 win. DigitalSports for both Irvington and Sleepy Hollow confirm Sleepy Hollow beat Irvington 9-8 (League). @dawgs_bsbl post was misidentified. Irvington is 0-2, not 1-1.

Ardsley.intel: Scrimmaged DF on Mar 19. 2026 record: 0-2. Lost opener to Pleasantville 1-7 on Mar 24. Lost to Hendrick Hudson 1-5 on Mar 28. New captains Carter Bucci and Nate Cal. Apr 2 at John Jay-CR result not yet posted. Up next: Apr 6, Apr 7, Apr 9, Apr 11 games upcoming.

Blind Brook.intel: Captains Robbie Cuesta and Elliot Zwicker return as seniors. 2026 record: 1-2. Lost league opener to Hastings 2-6 (Mar 24). Beat Edgemont 8-7 (Mar 26). Lost 5-15 on Mar 23 (opponent TBD). Up next: at Irvington Apr 11, vs Haldane Apr 10 (at Haldane), vs Edgemont Apr 8.

Edgemont.intel: 2026 record: 0-2. Lost to Blind Brook 7-8 on Mar 26. Lost 1-11 on Mar 30 (opponent TBD). DF plays Edgemont Apr 7. Up next: vs DF Apr 7, at Pearl River Apr 9, vs Haldane Apr 10.

Haldane.intel: Historic pedigree — 8x Sectional, 5x Regional Champs. 2026 record: 1-1. Beat Peekskill 10-0 on Mar 30. Lost to Rye Neck 1-13 on Apr 1. Up next: at Sleepy Hollow Apr 6, vs Irvington Apr 8, at Blind Brook Apr 10.

Hastings.intel: 2025 Section 1 Class B Finalists. 2026 record: 1-1 (1-1 league). Beat Blind Brook 6-2 in league opener (Coach Stampfl's 100th career win). Lost to Westlake 2-11 at Disney Wide World of Sports on Apr 1 (LEAGUE). Pelham result (Mar 30, non-league) still pending. Up next: at Eastchester Apr 4, vs Putnam Valley Apr 10, vs Scarsdale Apr 11.

Irvington.intel: 2026 record: 0-2. Lost to DF 2-6 on Mar 24. Lost to Sleepy Hollow 8-9 in league play on Mar 26 (corrected from earlier report of 10-1 Irvington win). Up next: at Haldane Apr 8, at DF Apr 13.

Leffell School.intel: Small private school in Hartsdale. Class C program. No 2026 intel yet. Stay tuned.

Pearl River.intel: Bigger school from Rockland County. Non-league game. No 2026 intel yet. Stay tuned.

Rye Neck.intel: 2026 record: 3-0. Beat Pawling 8-2 (Mar 25), beat Haldane 13-1 (Apr 1), beat Sleepy Hollow 15-5 (Apr 2). Offense is rolling. Up next: at Pawling Apr 8, vs Valhalla Apr 16, at Haldane Apr 18.

Saunders.intel: Yonkers vocational school. DF beat Saunders 7-3 on Mar 27 (home opener, Gould Park). Irvington JV beat Saunders 18-1 on Mar 26. 2026 record: 0-2.

Sleepy Hollow.intel: Head Coach Hunter Glashoff. 2026 record: 2-2. Beat Irvington 9-8 (Mar 26, league). Lost to Briarcliff 0-14 (Mar 31). Lost to Rye Neck 5-15 (Apr 2). On a 2-game losing streak with offense going cold. Up next: vs Haldane Apr 6, at DF Apr 8, vs Pleasantville Apr 10.

Tuckahoe.intel: Defending Section 1 Class C Champions. 14x Section 1 Champs, 7x Regional, 3x State. Four named 2026 captains (Gentry, Romeo, Brice, Briante). Connor Brice signed D1 with Villanova for baseball. No varsity games played yet. JV tied Putnam Valley 5-5 on Mar 27. Up next: at Somers Apr 7, at Mount Vernon Apr 9, at New Rochelle Apr 10.

Valhalla.intel: At Disney ESPN Wide World of Sports tournament. Played Westlake Mar 30 (LEAGUE, result pending confirmation). No DigitalSports schedule data available. Up next: vs Rye Neck Apr 16 (non-league), at Hastings Apr 18 (non-league), vs Haldane Apr 30.

Westlake.intel: Disney spring trip dominant. Beat Bronxville 4-3 on Mar 29 (non-league). Beat Hastings 11-2 on Apr 1 (LEAGUE) at Disney Wide World of Sports. Valhalla result (Mar 30, LEAGUE) still pending. DigitalSports showed 1-0 conf before Hastings game. Up next: at John Jay CR Apr 7, at Tappan Zee Apr 9, at Pelham Apr 11.
